name: Ginegar Plastic Products Ltd.
summary: Ginegar Plastic Products Ltd. produces and sells advanced films for various agricultural and non-agricultural applications worldwide. The company offers Sun Selector films for use in greenhouse and tunnel covering applications; and Mulch More films for crops and growing applications. It also provides ozgard, a virtually impermeable film, which enhances the effectiveness of fumigants, including methyl bromide, methane sodium, dicloropropene, iodo methane, and others; Super Seal geomembranes for use in soil engineering applications, such as reservoirs, waste disposal sites, sub-terranean structures, roadworks, and other projects; and table grape cover films. In addition, the company offers polysack nets comprising thermal screens and shade nets; energy saving screens and darkening screens; shading nets; protection nets; anti-insect nets; anti-hail nets; wind breakers; and decorative single and double layer products. Further, it provides shade and mesh nets; barrier films for soil fumigation with noxious chemicals; HDPE films for pond and reservoir liners; and heavy duty bags for chemical fertilizers. Ginegar Plastic Products Ltd. was founded in 1969 and is based in Jezreel Valley, Israel.
